nightly.commit_message:
Standardize to hotio naming convention

- Rename flood_version to version_flood
- Update Dockerfile ARG names accordingly
- Remove UDP ports from WEBUI_PORTS (TCP only)

release.commit_message:
refactor: align with upstream hotio patterns

- Rewrite forwarded_port_update_app to restart-based approach
- Add VPN port forwarding wait logic to service-qbittorrent
- Remove default qBittorrent.conf (qBittorrent handles internally)
- Use bash-functions and log_inf for consistent logging
- Use cleaner ${LIBTORRENT//v/} parameter expansion
